name: The Crimson Court
inspire: At the end of each battle round, Inspire each friendly fighter that has no hunger tokens.

reactions.name: The Hunger
reactions.trigger: Immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack,
reactions.rulesText: remove 1 of that fighter's hunger tokens. If the target of that Attack was slain, remove all of that fighter's hunger tokens instead.

abilities.name: The Curse
abilities.rulesText: Each friendly fighter starts the game with 2 hunger tokens. At the start of the second and third battle rounds, give each friendly fighter 1 hunger token.

abilities.name: Bloodthirst
abilities.rulesText: While a friendly fighter has 3 or more hunger tokens, they are bloodthirsty. Bloodthirsty friendly fighters have +1 Move and any Guard tokens they have have no effect.

abilities.name: Bestial Transformation
abilities.trigger: Use this immediately after you pick a friendly fighter to use a Core ability.
abilities.flavorText: Bones crack and flesh melts as the vampire assumes a dire new form.
abilities.rulesText: Discard that fighter's Upgrades. Until the end of the battle round, that fighter's melee weapons have +1 Attack dice. If that fighter is bloodthirsty, they also have +1 Move until the end of the battle round. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Vampiric Might
abilities.trigger: Use this immediately after you pick a weapon as part of a bloodthirsty fighter's Attack.
abilities.flavorText: Drawing upon the power of their curse, the vampire strikes with lethal accuracy and strength enough to shatter stone.
abilities.rulesText: That weapon has Cleave ({icon:cleave}) and Ensnare ({icon:ensnare}) for that Attack. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Tenebrous Form
abilities.trigger: Use this immediately after an Inspired friendly fighter is picked to be the target of an Attack.
abilities.flavorText: The vampire becomes one with the shadows.
abilities.rulesText: That fighter's Save characteristic is {icon:shield} 3 for that Attack. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Dark Transfusion
abilities.flavorText: Life force is ripped from the victim as the vampire feeds.
abilities.rulesText: Pick a friendly fighter to use this Core ability. Pick an enemy fighter within 1 hex of that fighter. You can pick an enemy fighter within 2 hexes instead if that friendly fighter is Inspired. Inflict 1 damage on that enemy fighter and then heal that friendly fighter. You can only use this ability once per game.
